refinement_lt_of_exists_ne_singleton (B : ∀ N ∈ D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : ∀ N hN, N = sSup (B N hN))
    (hB' : ∀ N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : ∀ N hN, ⊥ ∉ B N hN)
    (H : ∃ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}) :
    D < refinement B hB hB' hB'' := sorry
